<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - segmentation
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Nodes ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in 'MOw':
        print(f"  id={node['id']} color={node['color']} pixels={node['pixels']} hash={node['hash']}")
        if node['pixels'] <= 20:
            print(f"    boundary={node['boundary']}")

print("\n=== Adjacency ===")
for adj in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = adj
    ci = seg['nodes'][i]['color']
    cj = seg['nodes'][j]['color']
    if ci in 'MOw' or cj in 'MOw':
        print(f"  {i}({ci}) - {j}({cj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
